title: 为虚拟机添加虚拟持久内存(PMEM)控制器
title_en: Add a Virtual Persistent Memory (PMEM) Controller to a Virtual Machine
output:
VM created: WMITEST_pmem_controller
Default RASD: ResourceType=32771 SubType=Microsoft:Hyper-V:Persistent Memory Controller
AddResourceSettings ReturnValue=0
Readback: FOUND pmem controller RASD: InstanceID=Microsoft:0AAC93FA-898D-4D21-AA99-53DD4530EA5A\9BB6C87B-83AF-4E4B-8151-865EFD1E414C\0 ResourceType=32771
Cleanup: DestroySystem rv=4096
No residue.
RESULT: PASS - PMEM controller added and read back. add_rv=0
notes: PMEM 控制器的 ResourceType=32771，ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Persistent Memory Controller'。运行态类为 Msvm_PersistentMemoryController(CIM_Controller，无属性/方法)，控制器通过 Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData 添加。

无需手工拼装 RASD：从 primordial Msvm_ResourcePool（ResourceSubType 匹配）-> GetRelated('Msvm_AllocationCapabilities') -> GetRelationships('Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities') 取 ValueRole=0 的 Default 模板，GetText(1) 序列化后传入 AddResourceSettings。此为获取默认资源模板的通用范式。
AddResourceSettings 同步返回 0（非 4096 Job）并立即生效。读回可通过 VSSD.GetRelated('Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData') 按 ResourceSubType 过滤。
该操作等价于 PowerShell 的 Add-VMPmemController。挂载 PMEM 盘要求 vhdx 满足 IsPmemCompatible 与 PmemAddressAbstractionType（见 Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData），本示例仅涵盖控制器添加。
notes_en: The PMEM controller has ResourceType=32771 and ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Persistent Memory Controller'. Its runtime class is Msvm_PersistentMemoryController (CIM_Controller, with no properties or methods), and the controller is added through Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData.

There is no need to hand-assemble the RASD: obtain the ValueRole=0 Default template from the primordial Msvm_ResourcePool (matching ResourceSubType) -> GetRelated('Msvm_AllocationCapabilities') -> GetRelationships('Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities'), serialize it with GetText(1), and pass it to AddResourceSettings. This is the general pattern for obtaining a default resource template.

AddResourceSettings returns 0 synchronously (not a 4096 Job) and takes effect immediately. The read-back can be performed through VSSD.GetRelated('Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData') filtered by ResourceSubType.

This operation is equivalent to the PowerShell Add-VMPmemController. Attaching a PMEM disk requires the vhdx to satisfy IsPmemCompatible and PmemAddressAbstractionType (see Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData); this example covers only the addition of the controller.
